title: Aji de Gallina
description: A Peruvian classic, Aji de Gallina is a creamy, shredded chicken dish served in a rich aji amarillo sauce and garnished with intense roasted Peruvian black olives.
instructions: Heat oil in a large skillet over medium heat. Add garlic and cook until fragrant.
Add diced aji amarillo peppers and cook until softened.
Add shredded chicken and cook until heated through.
Stir in heavy cream, queso fresco, and aji paste. Bring to a simmer.
Reduce heat to low and let sauce simmer for 5 minutes.
Stir in roasted Peruvian black olives.
Serve Aji de Gallina over rice or with boiled potatoes.
Garnish with additional aji amarillo peppers and roasted black olives, if desired.
Refrigerate or freeze for later use.
